name: Foil Arms and Hog
realName: Sean Finegan, Conor McKenna, Sean Flanagan
oneLine: Irish sketch comedy trio formed at UCD's drama society in 2008.
bio: Foil Arms and Hog are an Irish sketch comedy group made up of Sean 'Foil' Finegan (the comedy foil), Conor 'Arms' McKenna ('all arms and legs') and Sean 'Hog' Flanagan (who hogs the limelight). They met in the drama society at University College Dublin while studying architecture, genetics and engineering, and formed the group in 2008. They post a new sketch on YouTube most Thursdays, tour internationally including regular Edinburgh Fringe runs, and are best known for short character-driven sketches about Irish identity, language and politics.
style: Weekly short YouTube sketches plus live touring stage shows
